Container.Name: Canticle

Branch.TagDescription: Stable releases. Recommended for most users.
Nightly builds from main. New features sooner, occasional rough edges. Not recommended for production data.

Container.Overview: Fetches time-synced (.lrc) lyrics for your music library from Musixmatch, on a schedule and via Lidarr webhooks, and writes them next to your audio files.
Container.Description: Canticle is a self-hosted lyrics fetcher and webhook service for your music library. It pulls time-synced .lrc lyrics from Musixmatch and writes them next to each audio file. Run it as a Lidarr (or any *arr) webhook endpoint to fetch lyrics on import, on a scheduled library scan, or both. Includes a web dashboard, a local SQLite cache, multi-provider fallback, and optional audio-based instrumental detection.

Config.Name: WebUI / Webhook Port
Config.Description: Serves both the web dashboard and the Lidarr webhook endpoint.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Stores config.toml, the SQLite database, and the encrypted secrets key.

Config.Name: Music Library
Config.Description: Your music library. Lyrics are written next to each audio file, so this must be writable. Add more Path mappings for additional libraries if needed.

Config.Name: Musixmatch Token
Config.Description: Musixmatch API token for fetching lyrics. Optional here: leave it blank and add it later in the web UI (Settings), where it is stored encrypted instead of in an env var. Without a token the dashboard shows a notice and lyric fetching stays off until you add one or switch to a tokenless provider (PetitLyrics). See the docs for how to obtain a token.

Config.Name: Trusted Networks (CIDRs)
Config.Description: Comma-separated CIDRs allowed to reach the web UI without signing in and to open the first-run setup page. The default trusts all private (RFC1918) networks, which covers both your LAN and the Docker bridge so the UI works out of the box. Narrow it to just your LAN (for example 192.168.1.0/24) to tighten access. Public IPs are never trusted.

Config.Name: Enable Web UI
Config.Description: Serve the browser dashboard and settings UI on the listen port. Leave true for the normal Unraid experience; set false to run headless (webhook + scheduled scans only).

Config.Name: Webhook API Key
Config.Description: Static API key Lidarr presents to authenticate webhook calls. Optional; you can also mint managed keys in the web UI (Settings, Webhook keys).

Config.Name: Master Encryption Key
Config.Description: Base64 of 32 random bytes (openssl rand -base64 32). Encrypts API secrets at rest. Auto-generated to a key file under /config if left blank; set an explicit value to keep the key off the data volume and preserve secrets across container recreation.

Config.Name: API Cooldown (seconds)
Config.Description: Minimum seconds between Musixmatch calls. 60 is recommended to avoid egress-IP rate limiting; the built-in default is more aggressive.

Config.Name: Filesystem Watcher
Config.Description: Watch the library for changes and trigger targeted scans (in addition to the periodic scan). true or false.

Config.Name: Instrumental Detector URL
Config.Description: Optional. URL of a separately-deployed YAMNet classifier sidecar (for example http://yamnet:8080) to detect instrumental tracks on provider misses. Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Log verbosity: info, debug, warn, or error.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: IANA timezone, for example America/Los_Angeles. Used for dashboard timestamps.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions. Default 99 maps to nobody on Unraid.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions. Default 100 maps to users on Unraid.
